title: Change app name from Resoult to Resolt

requirements.summary: Update the HTML page title from 'Resoult' to 'Resolt'
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Resolt' as the page title

file_operations.description: Change the <title> tag content from 'Resoult' to 'Resolt' to update the browser tab title

requirements.summary: Update the navigation header branding from 'Resoult' to 'Resolt'
acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'Resolt' as the application name

file_operations.description: Replace the 'Resoult' branding text with 'Resolt' in the header navigation component to update the application name display

requirements.summary: Update the footer copyright text from 'LocalMarket' to 'Resolt'
acceptanceCriteria: The footer displays '© 2024 Resolt. All rights reserved.'

file_operations.description: Change the copyright text from 'LocalMarket' to 'Resolt' so the footer displays '© 2024 Resolt. All rights reserved.'
